title: Session 07 — Return to Koviz
bodyText:
# What happened
The masked figure was **Samwell Miller**, a plague-rounds cleric of Gond. Koviz: everyone in the central city infected, total lockdown, candle-in-window = corpse for collection, the **Stonemasons sealed off** behind their gate. At the clinic, **Soni** verified Judy's tincture (~a week of borrowed time) and the party distributed doses. Her ask: **find and stop the source — ~7 days.**

Downtime, the big one:
- **Eddy's Oath**: no god answered, but his eyes and emblem blazed and **spectral wings** unfurled — an **Aasimar**. Varen took radiant damage as it happened and **his mark grew**.
- **Varen**: the orb, brighter, with a voice — *"I am in a cage. An unending cage. Help your friend. Help find him. Bring him back."* Also studied the **chained necromantic book**.
- **Felson**: **G told the truth** — he adventured with Felson's parents Yena & Roman; Gond sent them after a cult tied to **Lathandar's disappearance**; cultists dragged Roman into **the pool**, Yena dove in after. G then trained Felson into **Way of Shadow**. Gabriel (cured by Eddy) gifted **Gabriel's Keg**.
- **Brolin**: inside the dwarves' sealed bubble, confronted **Root** — contempt, menace, "we found a place with resources that make us stronger," and **Tad is gone**, "sent off to look into some things."
